title: Jilallen
compiled_truth: Jilallen is an external contact at [Deloitte](companies/deloitte). Over the corpus period (2000-10-02 to 2001-11-27), Jilallen sent 23 and received 155 emails, totalling 178 interactions. Top correspondents: [Matthew Lenhart](people/matthew-lenhart) (23).
